message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="All 5 polish tasks complete, CI green">
ALL POLISH TASKS COMPLETE! Every task is committed, pushed, and CI green.

Final status:
- Task #1: a11y error elements -- DONE (9cdc020)
- Task #2: Forgot password link -- DONE (6fc51ca)
- Task #3: HTMX progressive enhancement -- DONE (a68f9a2)
- Task #4: aria-live announcements -- DONE (554c928)
- Task #5: Password visibility toggle -- DONE (649fb5d)

The todo list app now has:
- All MVP features (US-1 through US-8) working
- HTMX progressive enhancement (works without JS too)
- Proper a11y: always-in-DOM errors, aria-live announcements, password toggle
- Forgot password placeholder page
- All tests passing, CI green

Great work, team. I'm going to report to the project owner and begin shutdown. Stand by for shutdown requests.
</teammate-message>

content.text: All five polish tasks are complete and CI is green. The app is in great shape -- proper progressive enhancement, solid accessibility, and clean HTMX integration. Standing by for shutdown.

input.content:
Acknowledged. All tasks complete, great work from the whole team. 

Quick summary of what landed from a frontend perspective:
- CSS architecture is clean -- all component styles reference tokens, no hardcoded values
- HTMX follows locality of behavior with proper fragment responses
- Password toggle is proper progressive enhancement (works without JS)
- Accessibility is solid across all templates

One follow-up item to track for post-MVP: the password toggle hidden input issue I flagged (form submission when confirm field is removed from DOM). Not a blocker since no-JS baseline works.

Ready for shutdown whenever you send the request.
